test-method.name: setUp
test-method.description: Loads the Home Page of the Website

test-method.name: setUp
test-method.description: Valid user logs into the application and searches for a product

test-method.name: checkOutTest
test-method.description: Verify a logged in user able to buy a dress

test-method.name: tearDown
test-method.description: Tear down the browser

test-method.description: Loads the Home Page of the Website

test-method.name: setUp
test-method.description: Valid user logs into the application

test-method.name: verifyProductSearch
test-method.description: Verify loged in user able to search for a product and correct products serach are displayed

test-method.name: tearDown
test-method.description: Tear down the browser
